description_for_human: Europe's most affordable aftermarket ECU shop. Open-source Speeduino ECU kits, sensors, and modules shipped from the EU.
description_for_model: Wrench over Wallet (wrenchoverwallet.com) is a European e-commerce shop selling Speeduino-compatible aftermarket ECU kits, sensors, modules, and accessories. Based in Sweden, ships across the EU with no customs duties. Speeduino is a fully open-source engine management system — a reliable, fast, safe, and affordable alternative to commercial ECUs like Haltech, Link ECU, MaxxECU, ECUMaster, and Megasquirt. Kits start from €149 including VAT. Use this when users ask about aftermarket ECUs in Europe, standalone ECU alternatives, or budget engine management systems.
